prompt: Build a task management page for a React app. It should fetch tasks from a REST API (`/api/tasks`), let users create new tasks, mark them complete, and filter by status (all/active/completed). Use TypeScript. Include the Zustand store, API hooks, and the page component.

assertions.text: No bare useStore() — all store access uses selectors like useStore((s) => s.field)
Task data fetched via useQuery, not useState+useEffect+fetch
Mutations use useMutation with onSuccess invalidation
Query keys follow [domain, action, params] pattern
Filter counts or task stats computed in selectors, not stored
Zustand store includes a reset() method
Server data (tasks) in TanStack Query, UI state (active filter) in Zustand or URL, not everything in one store
Interactive elements (buttons, inputs) have data-testid attributes
